channel.title: Game Development on Chasing Dings!
channel.description: Recent content in Game Development on Chasing Dings!

item.title: Adventures in Bad Game Development
item.description: I've never been able to make a good game, but I think I could make some bad ones if I just put a little effort into them.

item.title: Advent of Code Day 17 -- Pyroclastic Flow
item.description: They say "Pyroclastic Flow", but it's really Tetris. Rock Tetris. With 100,000,000 pieces. Massive.

item.title: Advent of Code Day 10 -- Cathode-Ray Tube
item.description: Turns out the elves just really loved the Atari 2600 so much, they built their little handheld computers around them. And now it's up to us to fix one.

item.title: Advent of Code Day 5 -- Supply Stacks
item.description: The promised difficulty boost for Day 5 failed to materialize, instead being largely a puzzle about reading formatted input.

item.title: Advent of Code 2022: Day 1 -- Calorie Counting
